heading: Today
text: Periods of clouds, with a chance for a few spotty snow or rain showers from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north this afternoon, more likely in the St. Lawrence Valley.  Highs in the 30s to low 40s.  Winds becoming south near 10 mph, increasing to 10 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west, with a few gusts to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Some localized snow or rain showers from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, tapering off after midnight.  Partial clearing, last in the north.  Lows in the 20s to low 30s.  Winds south to southwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light later at night.

heading: Friday
text: Some limited morning sun, then becoming mostly cloudy.  A rising chance of rain or higher elevation snow in the afternoon.  Highs in the upper 30s to low 40s north, and 40s to near 50 south.  Winds light, becoming southwest near 10 mph, steadiest from the Green Mountains west.
